verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I′m swept away by the wonder of Your love How One so great could love this one so small And when I realize the distance between Your heart and mine I'm amazed when You call me to Your side

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I come to You Not in my own strength But in my weakness I embrace the One who′s strong I come to You, To glory in Your grace You've accepted me In my frailty, So in humility I come to You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I stand in awe at the power of Your grace How One so great would suffer in my place And when I realize the difference Between Your thoughts and mine I'm amazed when You call me to Your side I surrender all I am Lay my heart within Your hand Knowing in my weakness You are strong
